meta.title: Air Force Jobs - Aerial Photographer
meta.description:
An Aerial Photographer gets the honour of flying with the Thunderbird's and taking those amazing aerial shots that are found everywhere. 
The Air Force will train you in photography as well as in editing, videography as well as how to deal with the intense G- Force from flying at speed. 
Aerial photojournalists get to witness many different types of work within the United States Air Force.

Are you or a loved one about to become the future of the Air Force?
Stay connected at every step of the Air Force journey as well as getting that training advice every week with the Sandboxx app: https://link.sandboxx.us/youtube
